_comment: min_monthly_hours=-10 parses fine as an integer (toWorkerRecord's parseInteger only rejects non-numeric/non-integer strings) but fails contractSchema's z.number().int().nonnegative() -- a ZodError surfaces as {field: 'minMonthlyHours', message: 'Number must be greater than or equal to 0'} (verified against the installed zod@3.25.76 build directly, not assumed).
